programme.title: Barijs Sīls: Īstens amerikānis
programme.desc: Stāsts par Bariju Sīlu, amerikāņu lidmašīnas pilotu, kurš iefiltrējās narkotiku kartelī CIP slepena uzdevuma ietvaros 20. gs. 80. gados, kas tiek atmaskots kā pret Irānu vērsta militāra operācija.

programme.title: Pēdējais elpas vilciens
programme.desc: Patiess stāsts par dziļjūras nirējiem, kas cīnās, lai izglābtu savu komandas biedru, iesprostotu desmitiem metru zem okeāna virsmas.

programme.title: Ilgas
programme.desc: Ričards Gīrs atveido biznesa magnātu, kurš sastop savu seno mazpilsētas draudzeni, kura ieradusies lielpilsētā. Vārds pa vārda un viņš uzzina, ka viņiem ir kopīgs bērns, par kuru viņš neko nezināja.

programme.title: After. Laimīgi mūžu mūžos
programme.desc: Kad atklājas šokējoša patiesība par abu ģimenēm, mīlētāji atklāj, ka nemaz nav tik atšķirīgi viens no otra. Tesa vairs nav jaukā, vienkāršā, labā meitene, kura satika Hardinu, un Hardins vairs nav tas zēns, kurā viņa kādreiz iemīlējās.

programme.title: Roboti
programme.desc: Arī pasaulē, kurā mīt tikai mehāniskas būtnes, ir vajadzīgi izgudrotāji. Rodnijs ir vienkāršs robotpuika, trauku mazgājamās mašīnas dēls, taču viņam ir liels sapnis - sastapt pašu varenāko robotu pasaules personu lielo Veldu. Rodnijs lielpilsētā ierodas tieši lielo pārmaiņu brīdī, kad daudzu robotu dzīve nonāk briesmās. Kopā ar saviem draugiem - izklaidīgo Fenderu un apzinīgo Paiperi - Rodnijs spēj paveikt vairāk, nekā pats iedomājies.

programme.title: Volisas salas balāde
programme.desc: Loterijā vinnējis lielo laimestu, vīrietis cenšas īstenot sapņus – dabūt savus mīļākos mūziķus uz koncertu savās mājās, tālā vientuļā salā.

programme.title: Gariem līdzi
programme.desc: Kad Čihiro vecāki tiek pārvērsti cūkās, viņa spiesta strādāt pirtī, kuru vada ragana. Starp gariem un brīnumainām būtnēm viņa atrod drosmi un labestību. "Ghibli" šedevrs apbur ar emocijām.

programme.title: Ledus laikmets
programme.desc: Dienā, kad zobenzobu vāveri vajā neveiksmes un viņa gandrīz pazaudē savu lielāko dārgumu ozolzīli, visi dzīvnieki dodas ceļā uz dienvidiem, meklējot glābiņu no aukstuma, kas piemeklējis zemi. Sliņķis Sids un mamuts Manfreds par ceļabiedriem kļūst nejauši. Pēc zobenzobu tīģeru uzbrukuma cilvēku apmetnei viņi izglābj mazuli. Par to rūpes uzņemas citkārt slinkais Sids un, kaut gan diezgan negribīgi, arī Manfreds. Nospriežot, ka bērna tētis ir dzīvs, viņi dodas to meklēt. Drīz ceļiniekiem pievienojas arī zobenzobu tīģeris Djego, kura uzdevums ir mazuli nolaupīt. Tā sākas draugu aizraujošais ceļojums, kura laikā visnepiemērotākajos brīžos pie apvāršņa parādās zobenzobu vāvere Skrets, izmisīgi cenzdamies glābt savu ozolzīli.

programme.title: Ledus laikmets 2: Atkusnis
programme.desc: Laika ziņas: Tuvākās piecas dienas ir gaidāmi lieli plūdi, kam sekos pasaules gals. Iespējams, nedēļas beigās varētu izlauzties kāds saules stariņš… Mamutam Manijam, sliņķim Sidam, zobenzobu tīģerim Djego, zobenzobu vāverei Skratam un pārējiem Ledus laikmeta iemītniekiem ir sajūta, ka viņu kūstošā pasaule sāk palikt pārāk slapja un ledus kalns, kas apdraud ieleju, tūlīt lūzīs. Taču tā nav vienīgā problēma – Manijs vairs nevēlas būt viens pats, taču ir pamatotas aizdomas, ka viņš ir pēdējais mamuts. Atkal ir jādodas ceļā, kur tiek satikta valdzinoša mamutiene (iespējams, pēdējā visā pasaulē) Elija, kuru pavada uzņēmīgs oposumu pārītis Krešs un Edijs.

programme.title: Ceļojošā Pils
programme.desc: Kad Sofija tiek pārvērsta par sirmgalvi, viņa bēg no pilsētas un atrod patvērumu Houla maģiskajā pilī. Starp lidojošām pilsētām un kara draudiem viņa atklāj mīlestību un drosmi. Studijas "Ghibli" šedevrs ir sirsnīga un burvīga pasaka.

programme.title: Mazais Stjuarts
programme.desc: Pēc tam kad futbola spēlē mazais Stjuarts par mata tiesu izvairās no nopietnas traumas, viņa audžumāmiņa sāk pārmērīgi uztraukties par pelēna drošību. Lielais brālis Džordžs, savukārt, ir atradis sev jaunu draugu un atstājis Stjuartu novārtā. Kad drosmīgais pelēns izglābj no vanaga nagiem kanārijputniņu Margalo, viņa sāk dzīvot kopā ar Litlu ģimeni. Taču kādu dienu Stjuarta jaunā draudzene vairs nekur nav atrodama. Stjuarts un viņa kādreizējais ļaunākais ienaidnieks kaķis Sniegapika apvienojas, lai atrastu Margolo. Savukārt Džordžs pirmo reizi mūžā ir spiests piesegt mazā brālīša prombūtni un melot māmiņai.

programme.title: Bridžitas Džounsas mazulis
programme.desc: Bridžitai Džounsai (Renē Zelvēgere) paliek 43 gadi, un viņas māte Pamela (Džemma Džounsa) atgādina, ka bioloģiskais pulkstenis tikšķ. Apmeklējot kāda drauga bēres, kurš gājis bojā lidmašīnas katastrofā, viņa satiek savu bijušo – Marku Darsiju (Kolins Fērts), kurš ir kopā ar sievu Kamillu (Agni Skota). Pēc bēru ceremonijas viņa dodas uz pašreizējo darbu, kurā strādā par draudzenes un TV diktores Mirandas (Sāra Solemani) producenti. Viņa uzaicina Bridžitu nosvinēt neseno dzimšanas dienu, taču Bridžita atsaka, jo grasās to svinēt ar draugiem. Taču viņa paliek viena, jo visi draugi ir aizņemti ar saviem bērniem. Viņa bēdīga pieņem Mirandas piedāvājumu, un abas dodas uz mūzikas festivālu. Nepaiet ilgs laiks, līdz Bridžita ar seju iekrīt dubļos, taču viņai palīdz glīts svešinieks. Vēlāk festivāla laikā viņa piedzeras un nokļūst nepareizajā teltī, pārsteigta satiekot vīrieti, kurš viņai palīdzēja. Viņiem ir sekss. Nākamajā rītā viņa klusām aizlavās. Bridžita dodas uz kristībām, kurās viņa ir krustmāte un Marks ir krusttēvs. Viņš atklāj Bridžitai, ka šķirsies ar Kamillu. Viņiem ir sekss. Tad viņa atceras, ka viņš vienmēr darbu vērtēja augstāk par abu attiecībām, un no rīta klusām aizlavās, pirms viņš ir pamodies. Kad Bridžita pamana, ka pieņemas svarā, viņas draudzene Šazera (Sallija Filipsa) pārliecina veikt grūtniecības testu. Tests ir pozitīvs. Strādājot pie raidījuma, viņa pamana svešinieku no festivāla un pārsteigta uzzina, ka viņš ir miljardieris Džeks Kvants (Patriks Dempsijs). Viņa tam atklāj, ka ir stāvoklī. Neskatoties uz sākotnējo šoku, Džeks apsola viņu atbalstīt. To pašu pasaka Markam, kurš ir sajūsmā, ka kļūs par tēvu. Bridžita uzaicina Džeku uz pasākumu, un atklāj, ka tajā piedalās arī Marks. Abi vīrieši labi saprotas, un viņi visi kopā dodas vakariņās. Viņa atklāj, ka jebkurš no tiem var būt tēvs. Džeks to uztver labi, taču Marks aiziet. Mēnešiem ritot, Marks atjauno sakarus. Kļūdas dēļ Bridžita pamet darbu. Kā bezdarbniece viņa nomākta klīst pa lietu...

programme.title: Zirnekļcilvēks: Atgriešanās mājās
programme.desc: Sajūsmināts par pavadīto laiku kopā ar Atriebējiem, Pīters Pārkers ir atgriezies mājās, kur dzīvo kopā ar tanti Meju sava jaunā mentora Tonija Stārka uzraudzībā. Viņš cenšas dzīvot vienkāršu pusaudža dzīvi, tomēr nespēj nedomāt par to, ka varētu būt sabiedrībai noderīgs ar savām supervaroņa spējām. Kad pie apvāršņa parādās ļaundaris, viņam būs iespēja tās likt lietā!

programme.title: Nerunā ļaunu
programme.desc: Kad amerikāņu ģimene tiek uzaicināta pavadīt nedēļas nogali idilliskā lauku īpašumā, kas pieder jaukai britu ģimenei, ar ko viņi iepazinās atvaļinājumā, viss sākas kā bezrūpīgas sapņu brīvdienas un drīz pārvēršas urdošā psiholoģiskā murgā.

programme.title: Blefotājs
programme.desc: Ekscentrisks miljardieris Džeiks uzaicina vecos draugus uz riskantu pokera spēli, kurā likmes ir tik augstas kā vēl nekad. Taču svešinieku iebrukums izmaina vakara gaitu - tagad uz spēles ir liktas arī klātesošo dzīvības.

programme.title: Pārdabiskais Venēcijā
programme.desc: "Pārdabiskais Venēcijā" ir asinis stindzinošs stāsts par slavenā detektīva Erkila Puaro atgriešanos. Ir beidzies Otrais pasaules karš, Puaro ir pensijā un dzīvo labprātīgā trimdā pasaules krāšņākajā pilsētā Venēcijā. Viņš nelabprāt apmeklē spiritisma seansu kādā vecā, spokainā pilī, taču, kad kāds no viesiem tiek noslepkavots, detektīvs negaidīti nonāk draudīgā ēnu un noslēpumu pasaules virpulī. Filmas pamatā ir Agatas Kristi grāmata "Veciem grēkiem garas ēnas".

programme.title: Kā apmierināt sievieti
programme.desc: Kad Džīna zaudē kontroli pār savu tīrīšanas biznesu, kurā nodarbināti tikai vīrieši, viņai jāpieņem pašai sava seksualitāte, ja vēlas uzsākt jaunu dzīvi.

programme.title: Mīlestība dejas ritmā
programme.desc: Talantīgā balerīna Bārlova nolēmusi īstenot savu sapni Amerikas mākslas svētnīcā Ņujorkā. Diemžēl iepazīšanās ar svētnīcas realitāti nav īpaši patīkama – pieredzējusī baleta pasniedzēja Oksana skaidri un gaiši pasaka: Bārlova vēl nav ne tuvu pilnībai. Norijusi krupi, meitene nepadodas un piedalās jaunas Brodvejas deju izrādes atlasē. Režisors Zanders pievērš uzmanību Bārlovai un izvēlas viņu mēģinājumiem. Pēc dažām dienām topošās izrādes kodolam pievienojas talantīgais pianists Čārlijs. Tāpat kā Bārlova, viņš ieradies Ņujorkā, lai īstenotu sapni. Puisim un meitenei rodas simpātijas vienam pret otru, bet Zanders nav vienaldzīgs pret meiteni. Bārlova drīz vien sapinas mīlas trīsstūrī. Izrādes mēģinājumi kļūst arvien intensīvāki, slodze aug, un ne Bārlovai, ne Čārlijam neatliek laika nekam citam. Darbs vaiga sviedros, nemitīgā spriedze, sāncenšu nodevība un cīņa bez kompromisiem prasa visus spēkus.

programme.title: Terra Villijs - planēta nezināmais
programme.desc: Kad kosmosa kuģis cieš avāriju un Villijs tiek nošķirts no saviem vecākiem, viņš nokļūst uz mežonīgas un neizpētītas planētas, kur ar izdzīvošanas robota Baka palīdzību būs jānoturas, līdz ieradīsies glābšanas komanda.

programme.title: Tauriņa stāsts
programme.desc: Tuvojoties ziemai, monarhu tauriņi migrē uz dienvidiem, lai pārziemotu siltumā. Taču Patrika spārni vēl nav gatavi tālajam ceļam un viņš nevar lidot. Nedomādams padoties, Patriks kopā ar savu labāko draugu kāpuru Mārtiju paslēpjas pārtikas treilerī, kuru velk Dženifera. Tomēr arī viņai ir savas bažas par ceļojumu, jo - tauriņam neierasti - viņu māc bailes no augstuma. Visus trīs gaida daudz piedzīvojumu un sūri gūtu mācību, līdz mērķis būs sasniegts.

programme.title: Ferdinands
programme.desc: Ferdinands ir pats labsirdīgākais bullis visā Spānijā. Neskatoties uz iespaidīgajiem izmēriem un milzu spēku, viņš jau kopš bērnības neizrādīja sevišķu interesi par badīšanos ar saviem sugas brāļiem. Nejaušības dēļ Ferdinands nokļūst to vidū, kuri tiek izvēlēti, lai piedalītos buļļu cīņās Madridē. Tagad Ferdinandam nāksies aizstāvēt savus miermīlīgos dzīves uzskatus un atgādināt pārējiem, ka grūtību priekšā galvenais ir palikt, kāds tu esi. Jo tikai tā tu spēsi izmainīt pasauli sev apkārt.

programme.title: Eliots: pats mazākais ziemeļbriedis
programme.desc: Eliots ir mazs zirdziņš, kuram ir ļoti liels sapnis, - ieņemt godpilno vietu Ziemassvētku vecīša ziemeļbriežu pajūgā, lai dāvātu bērniem prieku svētkos. Pēc tam kad Ziemassvētku vecītis nāk klajā ar paziņojumu, ka tūlīt dosies pensijā, mazajam Eliotam atliek vien tikai trīs dienas, lai pieradītu pārējiem, ka viņš ir šī goda cienīgs, neskatoties uz to, ka viņam nav atbilstošu ragu. Ja kaut ko ļoti vēlies no visas sirds, tad brīnumi notiek, vai ne?

programme.title: Dzīves grāmata
programme.desc: Meksikas pilsētā Sanandželā Manolo, Marija un Džoakvins laiku pavadījuši kopā jau kopš bērnības. Lai arī viņu dzīves ir bijušas atšķirīgas - Marija tika nosūtīta uz Eiropu, Džoakvins pievienojās armijai, bet Manolo studēja un kļuva par cīkstoni - viena lieta nemainījās. Manolo un Džoakvins abi vēlas apprecēt Mariju.

programme.title: Troļļi
programme.desc: Troļļi ir mazi un laimīgi radījumi, kuri savā pasaulē nodarbojas ar dziedāšanu, apskaušanos un būšanu laimīgiem. Tomēr viņu idilli mežā pārtrauc bergeni, kuri atklāj viņu atrašanās vietu un kuri ir milzu monstri, kas ir nepārtraukti nelaimīgi. Monstri atklāj, ka viņi var kļūt laimīgi, ja apēd troļļus. Troļļi glābjas, un viņus caur slepeniem tuneļiem vada karalis Pepijs. Pēc divām desmitgadēm Pepija meita Popija organizē izsmalcinātas svinības par godu tam, ka viņi ir izglābušies. Vientulīgais izdzīvošanas speciālists Zars pret to iebilst, jo uztraucas, ka troksnis varētu piesaistīt bergenus. Viņam izrādās taisnība, un bergeni nolaupa daudzus troļļus. Popija dodas glābšanas misijā, un Zars dodas viņai līdzi, jo neuzskata, ka Popija būs drošībā. Viņi ierodas bergenu pilsētā, kur ierauga, kā bergenu karalis apēd vienu trolli. Tomēr Popijas domas ir tādas, ka šis trollis tomēr ir izdzīvojis. Viņi atklāj, kur troļļus tur gūstā un kas tos uzrauga. To uzraudzītāja ir virtuves darbiniece Bridžita, kuru ir apbūris karalis. Viņa piekrīt atbrīvot ieslodzītos un ļaut Popijai un Zaram piekļūt karalim, ja viņai būs iespēja ar karali aiziet uz randiņu. Gatavojoties randiņam, Popija un Zars sastrīdas, jo Zars atsakās dziedāt, apgalvojot, ka dziedāšana nogalināja viņa vecmāmiņu, un šis notikums padarīja viņu pelēku. Bridžita tiek sapucēta kā lēdija, un viņa kopā ar karali dodas braukt ar skrituļslidām un uz restorānu. Troļļi tomēr nespēj Bridžitu pārvērst lēdijā uz visiem laikiem, un Bridžita sāk raudāt. Viņi mēģina izglābt troļļus, taču glābšanas laikā arī Popija tiek ieslodzīta. Popijai zūd cerības, un visi troļļi paliek pelēki. Zars sāk dziedāt un atzīstas mīlestībā. Visiem par pārsteigumu, troļļiem atgriežas krāsas, arī Zaram. Troļļus taisās apēst, bet Bridžita viņus izglābj. Karalis un citi bergeni atklāj, ka viņiem troļļi nav jāapēd, lai kļūtu laimīgi. Troļļi un bergeni laimīgi sāk dzīvot saticīgi, un Popiju kronē par troļļu karalieni.

programme.title: Zirnekļcilvēks: Ceļojums Zirnekļpasaulē
programme.desc: Fils Lords un Kristofers Millers, radošie prāti aiz "Lego filma" un "Džampstrīta 21", apvieno savus talantus un pieņem izaicinājumu – radīt unikālu skatījumu par komiksu pasaulē labi zināmo Zirnekļcilvēka visumu. Viņiem tas izdodas ar elpu aizraujošu stāstu un līdz šim neredzētu vizuālo noformējumu, pelnīti saņemot Oskaru par gada labāko animācijas filmu. "Zirnekļcilvēks. Ceļojums Zirnekļpasaulē" mūs iepazīstina ar jauno Maiklu Moralesu un vēl pieciem spilgtiem personāžiem no dažādām dimensijām, kuri apveltīti ar zirnekļ-supervaroņa spējām. Tikai darbojoties kopā, viņi var apturēt briesmas, kas apdraud visas realitātes.

programme.title: Blūmu ģimenes stāsts
programme.desc: Sema ir aktīvā dzīvesveida piekritēja, taču ģimenes ceļojumā pa Taizemi notiek nelaime – viņa neveiksmīgi nokrīt no balkona, savaino mugurkaulu un paliek daļēji paralizēta. Semas vīrs, trīs dēli un māte visādi mēģina palīdzēt un uzmundrināt sievieti, kura ir zaudējusi dzīvesprieku un slīgst arvien dziļāk depresīvā noskaņojumā. Pēkšņi mājas pagalmā uzrodas ievainots žagatas mazulis, kuru ģimene adoptē un nosauc par Pingvīnu. Neviens gan nebija iedomājies, ka tieši Pingvīns būs tas, kurš palīdzēs Semai atkal saskatīt dzīvei jēgu un atgūt optimismu.

programme.title: Mazgā mani upē
programme.desc: Narkomāni Šelbijs un viņa draudzene Rūbija cenšas atbrīvoties no atkarības un iet cauri ellei. Rūbija ir gandrīz atkopusies, kad viņu uzrunā sīks noziedznieks, kurš iedod viņai narkotikas, jo nevēlas zaudēt klientu. Atgriezusues mājās, Rūbija padodas atkarībai un injicē sev nāvējošu devu. Satriektais Šelbijs nolemj atriebties par mīļotās traģisko nāvi.

programme.title: Baltais zilonis
programme.desc: Bijušais jūras kājinieks Gabriels spiests cīnīties ar savu sirdsapziņu un pārkāpt goda kodeksu, jo viņam jāstrādā mafijas labā. Gabriels izpilda mafijas bosa pavēles, taču, kad viņam ir jālikvidē policiste, emocionālā spriedze sasniedz lūzuma punktu.

programme.title: Mīluļu slepenā dzīve
programme.desc: Makss (Luiss Sīkejs) ir enerģisks un sajūsmināts Džeka Rasela terjers, kurš dzīvo Manhetenas dzīvoklī kopā ar īpašnieci Keitiju (Elija Kempere). Taču viņa laimīgā dzīve pārtrūkst, kad saimniece pieņem jaunu suni Grāfu (Ēriks Stounstrīts). Makss apņemas atgūt saimnieces uzmanību tikai sev un mēģina Grāfu atstāt kādā sānielā, taču viņus ielenc kaķu banda, kuru vada Ozons (Stīvs Kūgans). Viņi tik tikko izglābj savas dzīvības, kad nākas saskarties ar pamesto dzīvnieku armijas niknumu apburošā, bet psihiski nelīdzsvarotā truša Sniegapikas (Kevins Hārts) vadībā. Šis ir Ņujorkas piedzīvojums, kurš liek Maksam un Grāfam izvērtēt savu sacensību un mēģināt izjaukt Sniegapikas atriebes plānu pret visiem dzīvnieku īpašniekiem Ņujorkā.

programme.title: Advokāts
programme.desc: Veiksmīgais advokāts ir sasniedzis savas karjeras augstāko punktu un atradis liktenīgo sievieti, ar kuru vēlas drīz precēties. Viņa mierīgo dzīvi iztraucē senas paziņas lūgums. Piekrītot šim piedāvājumam, advokātam nāksies pieņemt lēmumus, kas neatbilst viņa principiem un morāles normām. Viņš vēl nemaz nenojauš, ka, iesaistoties amorālajā narkobiznesā, viņa dzīve izmainīsies līdz nepazīšanai. Filmā piedalās krāšņs aktieru ansamblis - Maikls Fasbenders, Penelope Krusa, Kemerone Diasa, Havjers Bardems un Breds Pits.

programme.title: Basketbols: ACB league. Real Madrid - Breogan
programme.desc: Tune in and follow all the matches from the ACB League, also known as the Endesa League for sponsorship reasons, the top-tier men's basketball league in Spain.

programme.title: Futbols: Ligue 1. Lens - PSG
programme.desc: PSG, AS Monaco, Marseille, Olympique Lyonnais & Lille... just to name a few. Ligue 1 is currently full of well-organised football teams and incredible European talent, who are a complement to the sport. As the highest professional division in France, it has established itself as one of the top five leagues on the continent. Lyon are the most successful team in regards to consecutive titles, whereas PSG and AS Monaco have managed to propel themselves to the highest achievements in the league, with calculated foreign investment. With the latter coming from a principality, Ligue 1 is another example of a domestic league that provides cross-border competition. From southern wine-growing regions such as Bordeaux, to the historically renowned capital of Paris, we cover the whole of France.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Villarreal - Sevilla
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Basketbols: Eirolīga. Izslēgšanas spēles. 5. spēle.
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

Fixer Upper: Welcome Home
programme.desc: Chip and Jo are back with new ideas for turning outdated homes into jaw-dropping, innovative living spaces. Having expanded their business (and their family), the Gaineses now juggle more while renovating, which keeps things unpredictable.

programme.title: Vintage Flip
programme.desc: Jessie and Tina Rodriguez are living the American dream, taking their passion for vintage homes and turning them into successful flips. In each episode of Vintage Flip , this creative couple will find, buy, restore and market a vintage home. You never know what might be hiding behind hundred year-old walls!

programme.title: First Home Fix
programme.desc: Raisa and Austin pull off two renovations. Mark and Michael want a space to relax while Bethany and Dave's growing family needs storage and functionality.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Vince and Laurie are sick of the bitter winters in Chicago and are searching for their dream home on beautiful Hilton Head Island. They've already looked at over 100 homes, but have yet to find a place that meets their criteria.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: When a job offer comes up in Hilton Head Island, SC, Jim and Kerri decide to get serious about buying a home. Hilton Head Island provides a great family setting for these golf enthusiasts and their nine-year-old son, Conner.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families' dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you don't have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfront's in USA, looking for homes that won't break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tarek's picture-perfect wife, who Tarek's friends still can't believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, we'll follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin and Ben Napier love their small Mississippi hometown, especially the old historical houses. Using found materials and old textiles, they're keeping the character of these classic homes but giving them modern and affordable updates. From Erin's imaginative hand sketches to Ben's custom handiwork, this couple is bringing homes back to life and making sure their small town's future is as bright as its past.

programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?
programme.desc: A family fell for the allure of a home that looked straight out of a 1950s TV show, but it's dysfunctional layout has them all living on top of each other.

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their property's full potential. With half-demolished houses, unfinished floors and plumbing nightmares: these refurbishment mishaps are on a monumental scale. programme.title: Island Life

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tarek's picture-perfect wife, who Tarek's friends still can't believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, we'll follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: Reality series showing American house hunters who are considering joining the tiny-house revolution where people are choosing to live in smaller homes - often less than 55 square metres -and praising their benefits. In this property series realtors present three petite houses to prospective buyers. Some of the homes would be used as permanent residences whilst others could be a retreat to escape to. There are various reasons for the trend for tiny-living; some people are doing it for financial reasons, others are trying to live more ecologically and some yearn for a simpler lifestyle. When the potential tiny-homeowners are faced with the practical limitations of the properties on offer will they take the plunge and embrace the joys of tiny living? Or will they change their minds for more spacious accommodation?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Does a video recently presented to Congress by the U.S. Navy prove once and for all that UFOs really exist? Is the latest alleged Loch Ness Monster footage the most compelling proof of the creature's existence in years? How does a zombie fish head bite its way through a tin can? And marine scientists discover a mysterious "Yellow Brick Road" at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. Tony and his team of experts examine the evidence to find the truth.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and there's clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. It's up to them to determine what's real and what's fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyone's mind, "What's the story behind it?" and "What's it worth?"

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the world's top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into what's really happening--and why.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Did a rancher find a Chupacabra carcass in the San Antonio, Texas area? Did scientists studying a 15-ton meteorite discover new minerals that are proof of an alien civilization? Is a video of a dozen dinosaur-like creatures running out of the waterproof of miniature Loch Ness Monsters? Tony Harris and his team of experts examine the clues and make a determination about the validity of what we're seeing.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and there's clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. It's up to them to determine what's real and what's fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyone's mind, "What's the story behind it?" and "What's it worth?"

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The world's most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. programme.title: MonsterQuest
programme.desc: From Bigfoot to Swamp Beast, Monster Quest reveals the truth of legendary monster sightings around the world. One part history, one part science and one part monsters, Monster Quest discovers the truth behind these legendary monsters.

programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and there's clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. It's up to them to determine what's real and what's fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyone's mind, "What's the story behind it?" and "What's it worth?"

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the world's top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into what's really happening--and why.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: For the first time, the "Pawn Stars" are hitting the road to visit some of America's most exciting places in search of historical finds and impressive collectible objects in the new 8-part series "Pawn Stars Do America." Each two-hour episode follows Rick Harrison, Corey Harrison and Austin "Chumlee" Russell as they step out of the World Famous Gold & Silver Pawn Shop in Las Vegas to connect with fans in eight different cities and acquire some of the most remarkable items imaginable.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: For the first time, the "Pawn Stars" are hitting the road to visit some of America's most exciting places in search of historical finds and impressive collectible objects in the new 8-part series "Pawn Stars Do America." Each two-hour episode follows Rick Harrison, Corey Harrison and Austin "Chumlee" Russell as they step out of the World Famous Gold & Silver Pawn Shop in Las Vegas to connect with fans in eight different cities and acquire some of the most remarkable items imaginable.

programme.title: MonsterQuest
programme.desc: From Bigfoot to Swamp Beast, Monster Quest reveals the truth of legendary monster sightings around the world. Deploying the latest in hi-tech equipment, each episode scientifically examines the best evidence available, from pictures and video, to hair and bones, as well as the eyewitness accounts themselves. From pilots to policemen to ship captains, a number of seemingly credible people have seen things they can't explain. One part history, one part science and one part monsters, Monster Quest discovers the truth behind these legendary monsters.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: Warriors
programme.desc: Terry Schappert reveals why the Vikings were called the "Hells Angels of the Middle Ages". He tests the weapons and tactics used to pillage Europe. They pillage Europe, but they meet their match--the Saxons--at the Battle of Maldon.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: An FBI cold case that has laid dormant for 70 years leads a group of world-renown investigators on the ultimate manhunt to finally answer the question: Did Adolf Hitler survive World War II? In early 2014 the FBI declassified hundreds of confidential documents showing that Hitler may have not committed suicide but rather escaped to South America after the fall of Germany. A memo from J. Edgar Hoover himself states "American Army officials in Germany have not located Hitler's body nor is there any reliable source that will say definitely that Hitler is dead." Armed with the most cutting edge technology and these newly released FBI files the team will approach this case like a modern death claims investigation. Whether they are investigating a mysterious Nazi lair deep in the Argentinian jungle or diving for evidence of a missing U-Boat that could of shuttled Hitler to South America our team will focus on the tried and tested tenants for solving a fraudulent death case: follow the money where was the subject last seen, eyewitness reports, make contact with known associates and forensics.With declassified worldwide intelligence providing a wealth of new clues and modern technology never before available we reopen this world famous cold case in hopes of solving the mystery surrounding the demise of one of the biggest criminals of all time.

programme.title: Cities of the Underworld
programme.desc: In major cities around the world today, skyscrapers loom overhead, taxis honk their horns and street vendors peddle their wares. But below lies city upon city - each with its fascinating and unknown history. This series will explore these layers, which are often hundreds of feet deep, and examine a city's ancient cisterns, dank dungeons, eerie tombs, clandestine hideouts, and even underground shipwrecks that have been lost for hundreds and hundreds of years. What are the underground layers of the most populated cities on earth? And how did (and do) engineers build layer upon layer up to today's city streets? This series will reveal the technological marvels that allowed the construction of one city upon another - literally.

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: In the late Stone Age, the pagan people of the British Isles constructed some of the greatest monuments of the ancient world, fabulous constructions of wood, earth, and stone. In this hour, LOST WORLDS travels from the ancient stone villages of Scotland's Orkney Islands to Southern England in search of the soul of the Pagan's mysterious culture. This episode reveals a startling new theory about the role Stonehenge played in the lives of the pagans, while computer animation reconstructs the monument as it appeared to them. Experts trace a forgotten ancient pathway to Stonehenge's lost twin --Woodhenge-- and explore the secrets of Silbury Hill, the world's largest man-made mound. Finally, we'll visit Maiden Castle, a fortress that witnessed the pagan world's end.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Every day, new information is discovered that helps us better understand how our Universe works. Some of this evidence solves mysteries dating back thousands of years. Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, we'll tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. We'll also look at some of the Roman Empires' most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Atlantis Found
programme.desc: Adventurer-geologist Dr. Martin Pepper sets out to prove his theory - that the true Atlantis existed on the Greek island of Santorini, and was destroyed in the biggest volcanic eruption in human history. In order to achieve his goal, Pepper will use new scientific evidence gathered using state-of-the-art sonar scans of the sea bed and microscopic analysis of the ancient landscape. He must also match Santorini to a series of key clues embedded in the first ever description of Atlantis by the Greek philosopher Plato - from the lost city's strange ring-shaped design, to the role Egyptian priests played in recording the legend in the first place. By the end of the program, he reveals the stunning findings which may pinpoint the city and show exactly what it looked like.

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Documentary series that brings back to life lost cities, structures, cultures, and civilisations, transporting viewers back in time and revealing the truth behind some of history's most iconic eras. Using a combination of cutting-edge technology and archaeological research, the team detail what life was like for these places during their peak of their powers, and use visual overlays to compare past and present landscapes. From the Knights Templar to the lost city of Atlantis, ancient Egypt to Hitler's planned supercity, and ancient Athens to America's wild west, each episodes dives into these extraordinary remnants of human history.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Although supernovas are associated with the death of stars they also seed the universe with heavy elements that comprise rocky planets like Earth and living creatures. Due to their extraordinary brightness supernovas have a recorded history dating back 2,000 years. Although closely studied for decades their infrequency has permitted only a general understanding of their behavior until very recently. New computer models can model the major details of the explosion while new exploratory techniques reveal many more events including some truly super supernovas.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Gold Hunters: Legend of the Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: Legend tells of the Lost Dutchman's gold mine hidden somewhere within the 160,000 acres of brutal Arizona desert known as the "Superstition Mountains." The promise of a $200 million mother lode has lured thousands of treasure hunters and continues to claim the lives of those eager to decipher the legend's clues and riddles. Hunting for the Lost Dutchman is typically a one-man journey, but lifelong Dutch Hunter Wayne Tuttle is breaking with tradition and partnering with a team of experts to follow a newly revealed clue that could finally solve the 500-year-old mystery of America's most famous and deadliest buried treasure. With cursed mountains said to drive men mad and a hidden fortune of gold worth killing for, the treasure hunter's greatest danger may be the man at his side. Trust at your own peril if you dare to tread into HISTORY's Legend of the Superstition Mountains.

programme.title: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: The Alaska Triangle, a region in northwest Alaska, has more unsolved missing person cases than anywhere else in the world. Over 20,000 people have vanished in the past 50 years alone. Who or what's behind these cases is unknown. Some believe it's the work of local predators or simply the rugged, dangerous terrain, but legends thrive in Alaska, and the ominous history of disappearances in the area has drawn comparisons to the Bermuda Triangle. Working together with local experts and eyewitnesses, our team of investigators will go case-by-case to gather evidence, conduct tests, examine history and explore local myths to determine the most viable explanation for the disappearances, all while trying to understand the sinister mystery that is the Alaska Triangle.

programme.title: Doomsday: 10 Ways the World Will End
programme.desc: Theories of how the world will meet its end in this doomsday documentary as we follow scientist Trevor S. Valle as he hypothesises with others through the series. Looking into how the human race will be wiped out with each episode examining a different theory of how the planet will be destroyed. From being swallowed by a black hole, bombed by meteorites or overcome by aliens the series covers the most popular theories. An intriguing and interesting watch that will have you questioning how things out of this world could see the end of the earth.

Hunting for the Lost Dutchman is typically a one-man journey, but lifelong Dutch Hunter Wayne Tuttle is breaking with tradition and partnering with a team of experts to follow a newly revealed clue that could finally solve the 500-year-old mystery of America's most famous and deadliest buried treasure. With cursed mountains said to drive men mad and a hidden fortune of gold worth killing for, the treasure hunter's greatest danger may be the man at his side. Trust at your own peril if you dare to tread into HISTORY's Legend of the Superstition Mountains.

programme.title: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: The Alaska Triangle, a region in northwest Alaska, has more unsolved missing person cases than anywhere else in the world. Over 20,000 people have vanished in the past 50 years alone. Who or what's behind these cases is unknown. Some believe it's the work of local predators or simply the rugged, dangerous terrain, but legends thrive in Alaska, and the ominous history of disappearances in the area has drawn comparisons to the Bermuda Triangle. Working together with local experts and eyewitnesses, our team of investigators will go case-by-case to gather evidence, conduct tests, examine history and explore local myths to determine the most viable explanation for the disappearances, all while trying to understand the sinister mystery that is the Alaska Triangle.

programme.title: Doomsday: 10 Ways the World Will End
programme.desc: Theories of how the world will meet its end in this doomsday documentary as we follow scientist Trevor S. Valle as he hypothesises with others through the series. Looking into how the human race will be wiped out with each episode examining a different theory of how the planet will be destroyed. From being swallowed by a black hole, bombed by meteorites or overcome by aliens the series covers the most popular theories. An intriguing and interesting watch that will have you questioning how things out of this world could see the end of the earth.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: An FBI cold case that has laid dormant for 70 years leads a group of world-renown investigators on the ultimate manhunt to finally answer the question: Did Adolf Hitler survive World War II? In early 2014 the FBI declassified hundreds of confidential documents showing that Hitler may have not committed suicide but rather escaped to South America after the fall of Germany. A memo from J. Edgar Hoover himself states "American Army officials in Germany have not located Hitler's body nor is there any reliable source that will say definitely that Hitler is dead." Armed with the most cutting edge technology and these newly released FBI files the team will approach this case like a modern death claims investigation. Whether they are investigating a mysterious Nazi lair deep in the Argentinian jungle or diving for evidence of a missing U-Boat that could of shuttled Hitler to South America our team will focus on the tried and tested tenants for solving a fraudulent death case: follow the money where was the subject last seen, eyewitness reports, make contact with known associates and forensics.With declassified worldwide intelligence providing a wealth of new clues and modern technology never before available we reopen this world famous cold case in hopes of solving the mystery surrounding the demise of one of the biggest criminals of all time.

programme.title: Cities of the Underworld
programme.desc: In major cities around the world today, skyscrapers loom overhead, taxis honk their horns and street vendors peddle their wares. But below lies city upon city - each with its fascinating and unknown history. This series will explore these layers, which are often hundreds of feet deep, and examine a city's ancient cisterns, dank dungeons, eerie tombs, clandestine hideouts, and even underground shipwrecks that have been lost for hundreds and hundreds of years. What are the underground layers of the most populated cities on earth? And how did (and do) engineers build layer upon layer up to today's city streets? This series will reveal the technological marvels that allowed the construction of one city upon another - literally.

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Documentary series that brings back to life lost cities, structures, cultures, and civilisations, transporting viewers back in time and revealing the truth behind some of history's most iconic eras. Using a combination of cutting-edge technology and archaeological research, the team detail what life was like for these places during their peak of their powers, and use visual overlays to compare past and present landscapes. From the Knights Templar to the lost city of Atlantis, ancient Egypt to Hitler's planned supercity, and ancient Athens to America's wild west, each episodes dives into these extraordinary remnants of human history.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Although supernovas are associated with the death of stars they also seed the universe with heavy elements that comprise rocky planets like Earth and living creatures. Due to their extraordinary brightness supernovas have a recorded history dating back 2,000 years. Although closely studied for decades their infrequency has permitted only a general understanding of their behavior until very recently. New computer models can model the major details of the explosion while new exploratory techniques reveal many more events including some truly super supernovas.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Monica Lawrence has always jumped from one relationship to the next, afraid of ending up alone. Now, at age 32, she is married and miserable, catering to her verbally abusive husband Saleem. But Monica's unfulfilled life grinds to a halt when Saleem's cousin Frankie comes to town to plan his wedding with his fiancé Bianca. To Monica's surprise, she is reunited with Frankie, who happens to have been her first love. As old feelings surface, relationships are tested and everyone is faced with either doing what's right ... or following their hearts.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Every day, new information is discovered that helps us better understand how our Universe works. Some of this evidence solves mysteries dating back thousands of years. Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, we'll tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. We'll also look at some of the Roman Empires' most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Serial Killer Earth
programme.desc: In recent years the destructive power of natural disasters has been recorded, from Hurricane Katrina to the earthquake and tsunami that devastated Japan. Serial Killer Earth brings together a top team of experts to examine the most compelling footage from news and home video, as well as eyewitness testimony, in order to explain, understand and inform viewers of what actually happened during these disasters and how they compare and contrast with the most historic natural disasters of the past.

programme.title: Lost Gold of WW2
programme.desc: It is the last great mystery of WWII. The fabled Yamashita Treasure, a massive stash of gold bars and rubies worth billions, reportedly dumped in a cave by Japanese soldiers retreating from allied forces. While the fortune has become a legend, many experts claim there is no evidence it ever existed. Now, a dedicated group of investigators are resurrecting the dangerous search, using cutting-edge technology in pursuit of the truth, and unimaginable wealth.

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside America's UFO Investigation
programme.desc: In December of 2017, The New York Times published a stunning front-page exposé about the Pentagon's mysterious UFO program, the Advanced Aerospace Threat Identification Program (AATIP). Featuring an interview with a former military intelligence official and Special Agent In-Charge, Luis Elizondo, who confirmed the existence of the hidden government program, the controversial story was the focus of worldwide attention. Previously run by Elizondo, AATIP was created to research and investigate Unidentified Aerial Phenomena (UAP) including numerous videos of reported encounters, three of which were released to a shocked public in 2017. Elizondo resigned after expressing to the government that these UAPs could pose a major threat to our national security and not enough was being done to deal with them or address our potential vulnerabilities. Now, as a part of HISTORY's groundbreaking new six-part, one-hour limited series UNIDENTIFIED: INSIDE AMERICA'S UFO INVESTIGATION, Elizondo is speaking out for the first time with Tom DeLonge, co-founder and President of To The Stars Academy of Arts & Science and Chris Mellon, former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense and Intelligence, to expose a series of startling encounters and embark on fascinating new investigations that will urge the public to ask questions and look for answers. The series will reveal newly authenticated evidence and footage, interviews from eyewitnesses and former military personnel who have never spoken out before, and extensive breakthroughs in understanding the technology behind these unknown phenomena in our skies.

programme.title: Dog Detectives
programme.desc: Not only are they friendly, cuddly, kind and loyal, but man's best friend can also use their canine instincts to help law enforcement officials catch criminals. programme.title: American Detective with Lt. Joe Kenda

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: Documentary series that tells true and often tragic stories of the crimes perpetrated on the internet and of deception and manipulation triggered by online interactions - from predators lurking behind Facebook profiles to maniacs searching for their victims in chat rooms. Series includes re-enactments, comments from law enforcement personnel, true-crime experts, psychologists and interviews from friends and families of the victims. Rare episodes feature victims who were extremely lucky to survive and are able to tell us what happened.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery and People magazine partner to re-examine some of the most high profile crime cases in recent history. The one-hour series brings viewers tales of betrayal, buried secrets and unsung heroes, ripped from the pages of one of the nation's top weekly magazines. These stories transcended news and became part of pop culture, revealing shocking twists, new evidence, and unexpected resolutions. Interlaced within every episode are exclusive interviews with People's journalists, archival footage, re-creations, and firsthand accounts by those closest to the investigations.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: If you looked into the eyes of a killer, would you know? In American Monster, you find out. For the first time, viewers get closer than ever to some of America's most shocking and surprising crimes. Filled with never-before-seen footage of these devils in disguise, from home movie shots of them playing with their kids to musical performances at high school, from the church cook-out to the wedding video, American Monster interweaves twisting-turning stories of astonishing crimes, with 'behind-the-scenes' footage of killers at their seemingly most innocent.

programme.desc: True crime documentary series examining the troubling task law enforcement officers have, as they scour murder crime scenes for potential clues and evidence that will help them identify the culprit. Every potential item of evidence is pieced together, hoping to complete the sinister puzzle and bring justice for the family and friends of the deceased. As they uncover more about the victims, the detectives learn of their dark and mysterious secrets.

programme.title: Chaos In Court
programme.desc: CHAOS IN COURT examines clips of dramatic, unexpected, and cathartic courtroom moments. Each episode brings the backstories of the crimes and legal proceedings to the forefront with insightful analysis from a diverse panel of experts including judges, defense attorneys, prosecutors, and criminal psychologists. Featured within each episode are interviews with defendants, family members, and others who witnessed the action to help bring dramatic courtroom moments to life, and the emotional realities of what happens when the ultimate stakes are on trial.

programme.title: Shattered
programme.desc: Documentary series that looks at the impact a single crime can have on multiple lives. The show unearths past homicide cases that are still causing distress among the involved families today. Whether it's witnesses, families of the victims, or law enforcement officers, each episode provides a unique perspective on the committed crime, with the three tales slowly intertwining into one. Shattered explores the ripple effect that flows through entire communities after such harrowing crimes and, with the help of re-enactments and these personal accounts, shows the eternal pain that will burden these families forever.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: True crime documentary series. In these close-knitted communities, horrific murders have occurred, shaking them to the core. Every episode tells the story of a gruesome murder that happened in a small town. Delve into the heart of the cases through interviews with investigators, family members, prosecutors and neighbours. Various twists and turns can make you question reality, and the final outcome can surprise everyone involved. How well do you know the people next door?

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A mother calls on Texas Ranger Jim Holland, desperate for his help to solve the cold case murder of her son Joseph, executed in the East Texas woods.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programme.desc: A young mother begins to wonder if her once-happy, sweet boy is evil, but she could never imagine the true terror her son would become.

programme.title: American Detective with Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: In American Detective, Kenda trades in his own case files to bring viewers astounding investigations from across the country, with each episode featuring a different homicide detective whose tireless efforts helped put a killer behind bars and bring justice for the victim.

programme.title: Dog Detectives
programme.desc: Not only are they friendly, cuddly, kind and loyal, but man's best friend can also use their canine instincts to help law enforcement officials catch criminals. Using their remarkable sense of smell, which is up to 100,000 times more effective than that of humans, these policing pooches unearth deadly narcotics, smuggled goods such as ivory and even illegal immigrants. In this reality series we celebrate these canine crime fighters and the unbreakable bonds they have with their human handlers, showcasing their incredible abilities when out on call with UK police officers.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: Crime documentary series that examines homicide investigations using unfiltered footage, including body-cam, surveillance and interrogation-room footage, giving viewers a chance to follow a case from beginning to end. The series will give viewers a chance to experience how homicide cases are conducted, from the initial crime scene investigations by body cam, to home security tapes, to interrogation room footage of real confessions. Real tapes of the investigations will be combined with interviews with friends, family members, and law enforcement directly involved in the case.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: Crime documentary series that examines homicide investigations using unfiltered footage, including body-cam, surveillance and interrogation-room footage, giving viewers a chance to follow a case from beginning to end. programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade
programme.desc: Although the 1980s is one of the most fondly remembered decades, it was also a deadly one. This nostalgic crime documentary series looks beyond the big hair, bright and bold make-up, leg-warmers, electronic pop music, yuppie culture and classic movies. This series delves in the sinister side of the decade, revealing some of the more shocking events that took place at this time. Real-life murders are re-enacted. Whilst investigators are still grappling with questions about these horrific crimes after all these years. Shocking tales from all over the USA, from the death of a teenage cheerleader in California to mass murder in Missouri and homicide amongst New York's elite - this series may make you think differently about 1980 forever.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You
programme.desc: Tales of soured romances are explored in this true-crime documentary series, where loved ones turn against each other, leading to fatal consequences. Fraught with jealousy, betrayal, infidelity and anger, each episode focusses on a respective murder, brought to life with dramatic reconstructions and interviews with law enforcement and those with connections to the case. The series examines the incomprehensible outcomes of failing relationships, with emotionally charged partners taking the marital expression, till death do us part, far too literally.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You
programme.desc: Tales of soured romances are explored in this true-crime documentary series, where loved ones turn against each other, leading to fatal consequences. Fraught with jealousy, betrayal, infidelity and anger, each episode focusses on a respective murder, brought to life with dramatic reconstructions and interviews with law enforcement and those with connections to the case. The series examines the incomprehensible outcomes of failing relationships, with emotionally charged partners taking the marital expression, till death do us part, far too literally.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: A person suddenly and unexpectedly disappears; no trace, no clues, nothing but the lingering mystery they leave behind. According to the FBI's National Crime Information Center, there are now 110,484 active missing persons cases in the U.S., 53% are juveniles under the age of 18. Most of us have heard of the high-profile cases, such as Natalee Holloway, Stacey Peterson, and Chandra Levy. But have you ever heard of Mae Catherine Rocker, Alexis Peterson or Thomas Jay Kerr? Probably not. They are just a few of the hundreds of thousands of people in this country who one day, simply Disappeared. Most missing person's stories have never been told...until now. Disappeared is an exciting series that investigates the disappearance of these victims, who are here one minute, gone the next. Each episode focuses on one victim's story, as told through the perspectives and actual voices of their closest friends and family and the investigators trying to solve the case. Through interviews with family, friends, police, and searchers, each episode recounts the actions, thoughts, circumstances and motivations that led to each person's disappearance. Experience the victim's final hours until they vanished. Watch interviews with experts, from psychologists to forensic specialists to psychics, who will offer new insights into what may have happened in each case, whether the person was a victim of foul play or a runaway. Disappeared will take you inside the world of the missing, where a person can vanish without a trace, investigators race against the clock to solve a mystery, and the victim's anguished family and friends are left to wonder what in the world could have happened.

programme.title: Hunt For the Missing: Chicago
programme.desc: When Erica Thompson vanishes, police find her phone in another state, her car gone, footage erased. Was it her choice - or something darker?

programme.title: Before They Kill Again
programme.desc: Sometimes, the only way to stop a madman before he kills again is to get inside the mind of a monster and think like he does. Cops go head-to-head with the most dangerous and deadly criminals in one-on-one battles of wits, and only one of them will win.

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A mother calls on Texas Ranger Jim Holland, desperate for his help to solve the cold case murder of her son Joseph, executed in the East Texas woods.

programme.title: ID Presents: Nine at
programme.desc: American true-crime documentary series investigating a number of mysterious deaths, events and individuals. Each episode peels back the layers on a different story, where disturbing details and concealed secrets slowly begin to emerge. From the tragic death of Hollywood star Brittany Murphy to the disappearance of a 20-year-old girl caught in a love triangle, or Rick Kirkham's view on "The Tiger King" Joe Exotic to the disconcerting death of Jeffrey Epstein, these events have shocked the nation, and Nine at 9 investigates the truth behind each tale.

programme.title: Хор
programme.desc: Хор едет в пионерский лагерь "Орленок" на Международную Музыкальную Смену. Юра впервые в жизни видит море! В лагере у него начинается совершенно другая, новая жизнь. Лариса, проводив Кешу в лагерь, сообщает мужу Вадиму, что уходит от него. Вадим пытается ее остановить. Лариса и Андрей снова расстаются, на этот раз из-за его вернувшейся жены… Юрина мать и ее сожитель Борис отправляют деда подлечиться в санаторий в Звенигород. Санаторий оказывается домом престарелых, из которого обратной дороги нет…

programme.title: С.С.С.Р.
programme.desc: Весна 1981 года. Олимпиада позади, но еще не стерлась со стен олимпийская символика. Спокойное, мирное, сонное время – брежневский застой. Четверо друзей возвращаются из армии, вместе они прошли огонь и воду, нештатные ситуации, спасали друг другу жизнь. В шутку они называют себя "СССР" по первым буквам имен – Сергей, Семен, Самвел и Рома. История дружбы и взросления развивается на фоне стремительно меняющейся страны, но у их "СССР", в отличие от Советского Союза, есть надежда. Союз друзей сохранится, хотя за десять лет не раз будет испытан на прочность.

programme.title: Утро
programme.desc: Утренняя новостная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Ждём в гости
programme.desc: В этом выпуске программы - живописное кахетинское село Мелаани в Грузии, где зрители познакомятся с традициями рождественского стола местных жителей. Узнаем, почему сладкую выпечку в форме человечка грузины называют Басили, и как эта традиция связана с известным христианским богословом Василием Великим. Также в выпуске -спортивная школа наездников "Джарджи", где бесплатно обучают детей традициям предков умело сидеть в седле. И конный тур по ущелью Лакбе и окрестностям.

programme.title: Два с половиной человека
programme.desc: Закоренелый холостяк Чарли, постоянно опасающийся за свою свободу, и его брат Алан, недавно разошедшийся с женой, живут под одной крышей. Чарли только и делает, что заводит любовные интрижки, а Алан всеми силами пытается от него не отстать. В свободное от амурных приключений время братья воспитывают десятилетнего сынишку Алана Джейка.

programme.title: Два с половиной человека
programme.desc: Закоренелый холостяк Чарли, постоянно опасающийся за свою свободу, и его брат Алан, недавно разошедшийся с женой, живут под одной крышей. programme.title: Столичная штучка
programme.desc: Марина — менеджер в агропромышленной компании, она привыкла к городскому ритму, каблукам и маникюру. Но однажды её отправляют руководить установкой нового доильного аппарата в отдаленный район Тамбовской глубинки. Новая должность переворачивает привычный мир героини: отныне она живет в гостевом доме с баней, а окружают её простые односельчане и самые настоящие коровы. И теперь главная её проблема — убедить местных жителей, что "инновации" в области дойки им вообще нужны. А для начала Марине придется расположить к себе мастера на все руки Валеру, который пользуется авторитетом у простых работяг. Героине предстоит не только научиться находить общий язык с ними, но еще пройти путь от "столичной штучки" к себе настоящей.

programme.title: Столичная штучка
programme.desc: Марина — менеджер в агропромышленной компании, она привыкла к городскому ритму, каблукам и маникюру. Но однажды её отправляют руководить установкой нового доильного аппарата в отдаленный район Тамбовской глубинки. Новая должность переворачивает привычный мир героини: отныне она живет в гостевом доме с баней, а окружают её простые односельчане и самые настоящие коровы. И теперь главная её проблема — убедить местных жителей, что "инновации" в области дойки им вообще нужны. А для начала Марине придется расположить к себе мастера на все руки Валеру, который пользуется авторитетом у простых работяг. Героине предстоит не только научиться находить общий язык с ними, но еще пройти путь от "столичной штучки" к себе настоящей.

programme.title: Столичная штучка

programme.title: Ждём в гости
programme.desc: Сердце Грузии - регион Шида Картли в центре внимания нового выпуска программы. Зрители узнают о величественных крепостях правителей края - князей Амилахвари, в роду которых были знаменитые военачальники армий Грузии, России и даже Франции. Судьба многих из них так же сложна и полна драматизма, как и история этого края. В программе принимает участие этнограф и исследователь Георгий Месхи, давно изучающий историю этого уголка Грузии. А еще мы познакомимся с местным винодельческим хозяйством "Шато Атени", производящим знаменитые картлийские марочные и игристые вина. Также в программе рецепты редких блюд от хозяев шато , специально для "Ждем в гости"

programme.title: Ча-ча-ча
programme.desc: Екатерина в разводе, и с помощью танцев хочет отвлечься, чтобы пережить предстоящий переезд в Англию дочери и внука, ставших смыслом ее жизни. Кассирша Марина мечтает выйти замуж и родить ребенка. А финансист Рита пришла в танцевальный зал по совету психолога, чтобы спасти свой брак. Девушки отправляются учиться танцевать ча-ча-ча к лучезарному и неотразимому преподавателю Александру. Только мало кто знает, что и у Александра в жизни тоже не все так празднично, как кажется на первый взгляд.

programme.title: Орёл и Решка. Земляне
programme.desc: Ни для кого не секрет, что кенийцы - первые земляне, но что вы о них знаете? Национальные парки, чемпионы по бегу на длинные дистанции и бабушка Барака Обамы - это далеко не все, чем Кения может удивить вас. Ведущие Michelle Andrade и Кирилл Макашов познакомятся с уникальными людьми и их жизнью, посетят национальные парки Найроби, заночуют в трущобах самого опасного района столицы и узнают, как живут местные богачи.

programme.title: Провинциальный детектив
programme.desc: После событий первого сезона прошёл год, за который многое изменилось. Татьяна переехала в новый дом, и теперь не заскочишь утром на чашку кофе обсудить последние новости. Но никакие расстояния не могут разлучить подруг, и когда Ольгу обвиняют в убийстве соседки Инны Малеевой, Татьяна бросается на помощь. Она вычислит настоящего убийцу - на этот раз ключ к разгадке найдется у отца Брауна, героя детективных романов Честертона.

programme.title: Главное
programme.desc: Ежедневная информационная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Пять минут тишины. Возвращение
programme.desc: Из Петербурга присылают нового медика — капитана Андрея Балашова — человека опытного, спокойного, но неразговорчивого. Врач вскользь знакомится с командой и держится отстраненно. Почти сразу начинается его боевое крещение: в торговом центре "Атлант" обнаружено задымление. Спасатели и пожарные проводят эвакуацию, а после обнаруживается, что инцидент кто-то запустил несколько дымовых шашек, чтобы в суматохе обчистить ювелирный магазин. Известно, что грабитель проник в здание в форме сотрудника МЧС. Под подозрение попадают все спасатели, участвовавшие в операции.

programme.title: С.С.С.Р.
programme.desc: Весна 1981 года. Олимпиада позади, но еще не стерлась со стен олимпийская символика. Спокойное, мирное, сонное время – брежневский застой. Четверо друзей возвращаются из армии, вместе они прошли огонь и воду, нештатные ситуации, спасали друг другу жизнь. В шутку они называют себя "СССР" по первым буквам имен – Сергей, Семен, Самвел и Рома. История дружбы и взросления развивается на фоне стремительно меняющейся страны, но у их "СССР", в отличие от Советского Союза, есть надежда. Союз друзей сохранится, хотя за десять лет не раз будет испытан на прочность.

programme.title: Лицом к событию
programme.desc: Лидер в той или иной сфере общественной жизни - человек известный и информированный - под перекрестным огнем вопросов ведущих программы Михаила Соколова и Елены Рыковцевой.

programme.title: Хор
programme.desc: В "Орленке" Грачев готовит Юру к сложнейшей вокальной партии. В заброшенной церкви Юра и Хор поют "Аве Марию" Каччини. О выступлении тут же становится известно начальству. Лариса приезжает к морю, чтобы быть рядом с сыном. Устраивается посудомойкой в шашлычную, не зная, что рядом на диком пляже живет Андрей с дочкой. Юрин дедушка Петр Ильич встречает в доме престарелых своего однополчанина, уговаривает его бежать оттуда.

programme.title: С.С.С.Р.
programme.desc: Весна 1981 года. Олимпиада позади, но еще не стерлась со стен олимпийская символика. Спокойное, мирное, сонное время – брежневский застой. programme.title: Два с половиной человека
programme.desc: Закоренелый холостяк Чарли, постоянно опасающийся за свою свободу, и его брат Алан, недавно разошедшийся с женой, живут под одной крышей. Чарли только и делает, что заводит любовные интрижки, а Алан всеми силами пытается от него не отстать. В свободное от амурных приключений время братья воспитывают десятилетнего сынишку Алана Джейка.

programme.title: Два с половиной человека
programme.desc: Закоренелый холостяк Чарли, постоянно опасающийся за свою свободу, и его брат Алан, недавно разошедшийся с женой, живут под одной крышей. programme.title: Ждём в гости
programme.desc: Кавказские мастера холодного оружия всегда славились на весь мир. Старинные кинжалы, сабли и шашки по сей день хранятся во многих грузинских семьях - как дорогие фамильные реликвии. Исторически военное искусство у горцев было делом первостепенной важности, поэтому изделия именитых мастеров особо почитались. В разговоре на тему истории кавказского оружия принимает участие коллекционер и реконструктор исторических сражений Давид Насаридзе. Познакомимся и c самым именитым и прославленным тбилисским оружейником Тамазом Джалагания, чьи работы украшают частные коллекции многих стран.

programme.title: Завтрак в постель
programme.desc: Арина Волошина работает горничной в отеле. У нее за плечами неоконченное высшее по менеджменту, в мечтах - открытие своей гостиницы, а в реальности - тяжелая работа и маленькая дочка Таня, растущая без отца. Однажды в отель на бизнес-семинар съезжаются важные гости. Среди них капризная дама - бывшая балерина Ирина Штайн, а также молодой миллионер Артем Гордин, возглавляющий список самых завидных женихов страны. Арина случайно принимает Гордина за нового работника и не церемонится с ним. Артем же, давно уставший от постоянного внимания и фальшивых улыбок, захотел почувствовать себя обыкновенным человеком. Он решает подыграть Арине и не рассказывать, кто же он на самом деле…

programme.title: Завтрак в постель
programme.desc: Арина Волошина работает горничной в отеле.
